title: IAMMAI Continuity Turn
description: First bounded schema for continuity turns emitted in v0 for successful lawful bounded runs. A continuity turn links one bounded run and one bounded matter to preserved canonical artifacts without replacing validation, witness, governance, transition, state, or registry preservation.

turn_id.description: Stable identifier for the continuity turn.

run_id.description: Reference to the bounded successful run for which the continuity turn was emitted.

matter_ref.description: Reference to the bounded matter linked to the run.

recorded_at.description: Time at which the continuity turn was recorded.

predecessor_turn_ref.description: Optional explicit reference to a prior continuity turn where lawful predecessor relation already exists. This remains optional in v0.

validation_ref.description: Optional reference to a preserved validation artifact that helps anchor the continuity turn. The continuity turn does not replace validation.

witness_ref.description: Optional reference to a preserved witness artifact that helps anchor the continuity turn. The continuity turn does not replace witness.

governance_action_ref.description: Optional reference to a preserved governance action record that helps anchor the continuity turn. The continuity turn does not replace governance.

transition_ref.description: Optional reference to a preserved transition record that helps anchor the continuity turn. The continuity turn does not replace transition.

state_ref.description: Optional reference to a preserved state record that helps anchor the continuity turn. The continuity turn does not replace state.
